faqs.question: What types of flies are common in Mount Pleasant, Westchester?
faqs.answer: Mount Pleasant properties commonly deal with house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, and cluster flies. Due to the area's proximity to wooded areas and the Kensico Reservoir, seasonal flies can also become problematic. Our technicians identify the specific fly species affecting your property and customize treatment accordingly for maximum effectiveness.
